text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à l'un des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

text.en: Discard an Energy from this Pokémon. If you do, switch it with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.
text.fr: Défaussez une Énergie de ce Pokémon. Dans ce cas, échangez-le contre l'un de vos Pokémon de Banc.

text.en: If Durant is on your Bench, this attack does 60 more damage.
text.fr: Si Fermite est sur votre Banc, cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: They lay their eggs deep inside their nests. When attacked by Heatmor, they retaliate using their massive mandibles.

text.en: This attack also does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 20 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

text.en: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
text.fr: Lancez une pièce. Si c'est face, le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Paralysé.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon will look into your eyes and read the contents of your heart. If it finds evil there, it promptly hides away.

text.en: This attack does 30 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 30 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Brave and prideful, this Pokémon dashes airily through the forest, its steps aided by the psychic power stored in the fur on its fetlocks.

text.en: Put this Pokémon and all attached cards into your hand.
text.fr: Ajoutez à votre main ce Pokémon et toutes les cartes attachées.

flavor_text.en: Born from gases, anyone would faint if engulfed by its gaseous body, which contains poison.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.

flavor_text.en: Its tongue is made of gas. If licked, its victim starts shaking constantly until death eventually comes.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi.

flavor_text.en: On the night of a full moon, if shadows move on their own and laugh, it must be Gengar's doing.

text.en: Switch all damage counters on this Pokémon with those on your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Échangez tous les marqueurs de dégâts de ce Pokémon contre ceux du Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

text.en: During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.
text.fr: Pendant le prochain tour de votre adversaire, le Pokémon Défenseur ne peut pas battre en retraite.

text.en: Heal 30 damage from this Pokémon.
text.fr: Soignez 30 dégâts de ce Pokémon.

flavor_text.en: It eats dreams and releases mist. The mist is pink when it's eating a good dream, and black when it's eating a nightmare.

text.en: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep. During Pokémon Checkup, your opponent flips 2 coins instead of 1. If either of them is tails, that Pokémon is still Asleep.
text.fr: Le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est maintenant Endormi. Pendant le Contrôle Pokémon, votre adversaire lance 2 pièces au lieu d'une. S'il obtient au moins un côté pile, ce Pokémon-là reste Endormi.

text.en: If your opponent's Active Pokémon is Asleep, this attack does 120 more damage.
text.fr: Si le Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire est Endormi, cette attaque inflige 120 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: It drowses and dreams all the time. It's best to leave it be if it's just woken up, as it's a terrible grump when freshly roused from sleep.

text.en: Each player draws 2 cards.
text.fr: Chaque joueur pioche 2 cartes.

flavor_text.en: This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea.

text.en: If any of your Grass Pokémon were Knocked Out by damage from an opponent's attack during their last turn, this attack does 90 more damage.
text.fr: Si l'un de vos Pokémon Grass a été mis K.O. par les dégâts d'une attaque de votre adversaire lors de son dernier tour, cette attaque inflige 90 dégâts supplémentaires.

text.en: During your next turn, this Pokémon can't use Giga Hammer.
text.fr: Pendant votre prochain tour, ce Pokémon ne peut pas utiliser Giga Marteau.

text.en: Each player draws 2 cards.
text.fr: Chaque joueur pioche 2 cartes.

text.en: Your opponent reveals their hand. This attack does 50 damage for each Trainer card you find there.
text.fr: Votre adversaire dévoile sa main. Cette attaque inflige 50 dégâts pour chaque carte Dresseur que vous y trouvez.

flavor_text.en: This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found.

text.en: This attack does 60 more damage for each Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige 60 dégâts supplémentaires pour chaque Énergie attachée au Pokémon Actif de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: If a Diglett digs through a field, it leaves the soil perfectly tilled and ideal for planting crops.
A team of Diglett triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground.

text.en: If Hitmonchan is on your Bench, this attack does 80 more damage.
text.fr: Si Tygnon est sur votre Banc, cette attaque inflige 80 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.

text.en: If Hitmonlee is on your Bench, this attack does 20 more damage.
text.fr: Si Kicklee est sur votre Banc, cette attaque inflige 20 dégâts supplémentaires.

flavor_text.en: Its punches slice the air. However, it seems to need a short break after fighting for three minutes.
It can remember only one thing at a time. Once it starts rushing, it forgets why it started.

text.en: Discard the top 2 cards of your opponent's deck.
text.fr: Défaussez les 2 cartes du dessus du deck de votre adversaire.

flavor_text.en: Strong, but not too bright, this Pokémon can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging tackles.

text.en: This attack also does 10 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 10 dégâts à 2 des Pokémon de Banc de votre adversaire. (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees Fahrenheit.

text.en: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance.
text.fr: Les dégâts de cette attaque ne sont pas affectés par la Résistance.

text.en: This attack also does 60 damage to each Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it (both yours and your opponent's). (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)
text.fr: Cette attaque inflige aussi 60 dégâts à chacun des Pokémon de Banc ayant au moins un marqueur de dégâts (les vôtres et ceux de votre adversaire). (N'appliquez ni la Faiblesse ni la Résistance aux Pokémon de Banc.)

flavor_text.en: It relies on its carapace to deflect incoming attacks and throw its enemy off balance. As soon as that happens, it drives its drill into the foe.
